confidence_score.description: Overall match confidence on the 0-100 integer scale (ADR-0008 / DC-4), consistent with evidence[].confidence and improvement_suggestions[].confidence. A reported value only; it does not encode matching weights, trust tiers, scoring formulas, or any private engine internals. The status_color thresholds remain server-side and are not encoded here.
confidence_score.$comment: A8 SDK field-level hardening (DC-4): constrained to integer 0-100 per ADR-0008, aligned with the already-hardened per-entry confidence fields. This does not close DD-3 and does not declare B2 complete.

evidence.description: Public-safe provenance for the match: an ordered list of evidence entries describing which signals supported the result, by what method, and with what per-entry confidence. Support/explanation data only. This must not encode matching weights, trust weights, scoring formulas, ranking algorithms, or any private engine/learning internals.

method.description: How this evidence entry was derived (provenance only).

source_fields.description: Public-safe input field name(s)/path(s) this entry was derived from (e.g. invoice line fields). Field references only; exposes no Core model or engine internals.

source_type.description: Generic, public-safe category of the source this entry draws on.

source_reference.description: Optional generic, public-safe reference name for the source. Must not expose tenant knowledge-graph internals or private identifiers.

confidence.description: Per-entry confidence on the 0-100 integer scale (consistent with confidence_score, ADR-0008). A reported value only; not a weight, trust tier, or scoring formula.
confidence.$comment: Scale aligned with confidence_score (ADR-0008 / DC-4) to avoid introducing a conflicting confidence scale.

summary.description: Optional short, human-readable explanation of this entry. Support text only; must not expose raw prompts, model reasoning, hidden chain-of-thought, or provider raw responses.

improvement_suggestions.description: Public-safe, review-only enrichment recommendations for this match: an ordered list of human-reviewable suggestions a reviewer MAY act on. Each entry is advisory only and is never an auto-applied mutation instruction (AC-R1). Support/explanation data only. This must not encode matching weights, trust weights/tiers, scoring formulas, ranking algorithms, learning internals, or any private engine/Core model internals.

kind.description: Public-safe category of the suggested enrichment (intent/provenance only; not an executable instruction).
kind.$comment: A6 SDK hardening: conservative public-safe subset grounded in the available in-repo contract surface, pending final DD-3/B2 closure. The full FD-3 / DC-2 kind catalogue is owned by the planning-repo Field Dictionary; additional values are to be added when FD-3 is available in this repo and are not inferred here. This enum does not close DD-3 and does not declare B2 complete.

target_field.description: Public-safe input field name/path the suggestion applies to (e.g. an invoice line field). Field reference only; exposes no Core model or engine internals.

proposed_value.description: Optional public-safe proposed value for the suggested enrichment (e.g. an alias string). Plain data only; not an instruction to mutate any record.

status.description: Lifecycle of the suggestion (FD-3): 'proposed' = produced by the system and awaiting human review; 'confirmed' = accepted by a human reviewer. Reported state only.

review_only.description: Always true. Asserts the suggestion is advisory and requires human review (AC-R1); it is never an auto-mutation instruction.

confidence.description: Per-suggestion confidence on the 0-100 integer scale (consistent with confidence_score, ADR-0008). A reported value only; not a weight, trust tier, or scoring formula.
confidence.$comment: Scale aligned with confidence_score (ADR-0008 / DC-4) to avoid introducing a conflicting confidence scale.

evidence.description: Public-safe support notes for why this suggestion was made. Short human-readable strings only; must not expose raw prompts, model reasoning, hidden chain-of-thought, provider raw responses, weighting, or scoring internals.

summary.description: Optional short, human-readable explanation of this suggestion. Support text only; must not expose raw prompts, model reasoning, hidden chain-of-thought, or provider raw responses.
